headline: AI-native ways of working
lede: Impact comes from judgment: when to use AI, how to verify output, and what to automate. This portfolio is generated from live Jira data.

pillars.title: Automation & agents
pillars.body: Describe your Dr.-Nexus / Codex / agent workflows here.

pillars.title: Review & verification
pillars.body: How you validate AI output before merge.

pillars.title: Data-backed storytelling
pillars.body: Why Jira-backed charts matter for your review.

pillars.title: Continuous learning
pillars.body: What you learned when AI did not work.
